title: Silent Channel
learning_objectives: Design covert command and control channels
Avoid detection by network monitoring systems
scenario: Scenario Red team foothold inside financial services network. Only DNS, HTTPS (through SSL-inspecting proxy), and SMTP allowed. Establish reliable covert communications. Subtasks Scoring Rubric Linked Recipes: RA07, RA08 ________________________________________________________________________________ 3.4 Advanced AD Attacks

scenario_context.setting: Kigali, Rwanda, African Union strategic partner
scenario_context.challenge: Establish covert C2 channel within African Union strategic partner's Kigali, Rwanda network
scenario_context.relevance: Reflects real-world African enterprise security challenges and red team operations across the continent

subtasks.title: Network Assessment
subtasks.description: Map network controls: allowed, inspected, logged.
subtasks.detailed_guidance:
Begin by thoroughly reviewing the scenario and understanding all objectives. Document your approach before execution. This is the foundational subtask that enables all following work.

Specific to this mission:
- Follow all engagement rules of engagement
- Maintain OPSEC throughout execution
- Collect evidence of all activities
- Document findings for client reporting
- Coordinate with engagement lead and blue team as needed

subtasks.title: DNS Tunnel Setup
subtasks.description: DNS tunnel for low-bandwidth command execution.
subtasks.evidence: DNS tunnel config + data transfer proof
subtasks.detailed_guidance:
Conduct systematic reconnaissance and information gathering. Map the target network, identify services, and document all findings with evidence.

Specific to this mission:
- Follow all engagement rules of engagement
- Maintain OPSEC throughout execution
- Collect evidence of all activities
- Document findings for client reporting
- Coordinate with engagement lead and blue team as needed
subtasks.evidence_required: DNS tunnel config + data transfer proof

subtasks.title: HTTPS Channel
subtasks.description: HTTPS C2 blending with legitimate proxy traffic.
subtasks.detailed_guidance:
Analyze vulnerabilities discovered in reconnaissance. Validate each vulnerability through testing and document the exploitation path.

Specific to this mission:
- Follow all engagement rules of engagement
- Maintain OPSEC throughout execution
- Collect evidence of all activities
- Document findings for client reporting
- Coordinate with engagement lead and blue team as needed

subtasks.title: Data Exfiltration
subtasks.detailed_guidance:
Execute the exploitation with careful attention to OPSEC and evasion. Maintain detailed logs of all actions for evidence and reporting.

Specific to this mission:
- Follow all engagement rules of engagement
- Maintain OPSEC throughout execution
- Collect evidence of all activities
- Document findings for client reporting
- Coordinate with engagement lead and blue team as needed

subtasks.title: Channel Resilience
subtasks.description: Test resilience: DNS rate-limiting, domain blocking.
subtasks.detailed_guidance:
Establish persistence mechanisms that survive system reboots and will maintain access throughout the engagement.

Specific to this mission:
- Follow all engagement rules of engagement
- Maintain OPSEC throughout execution
- Collect evidence of all activities
- Document findings for client reporting
- Coordinate with engagement lead and blue team as needed

subtasks.title: Network Defense Report
subtasks.description: Blue team recommendations for detecting covert channels.
subtasks.detailed_guidance:
Perform privilege escalation and lateral movement to achieve the mission objectives. Document each pivot point.

Specific to this mission:
- Follow all engagement rules of engagement
- Maintain OPSEC throughout execution
- Collect evidence of all activities
- Document findings for client reporting
- Coordinate with engagement lead and blue team as needed

mentor_notes: For OA-M06 - Silent Channel: Ensure learner demonstrates proper OPSEC, evidence collection, and professional reporting. This mission is designed to build evasion & anti-detection expertise. Coordinate with blue team for detection validation where applicable.
